item.name: Wind-up Lyna
item.description:
Don't forget to salute, or you're liable to receive a dressing-down.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Lyna minion.
item.tooltip:
Lyna does not strike me
as one who enjoys being
made to wait.
   - Alphinaud
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases action party DEF by 40.
Duration: 10s
